---
title: "wandR"
description: "Transform R learning into an entertaining journey by weaving the magic of the wizarding world into R programming."
image: ../../img/packages/wandr.png
order: 3
categories: [education, fun]
href: https://focardozom.github.io/wandR/
---

[Visit website →](https://focardozom.github.io/wandR/){.pkg-link target="_blank"}
